zh: 而且……在这里，我遇到了很多喜欢我设计的人。
en: And... here, I've met so many people who actually love my designs.

zh: 以后你会遇到更多的。来，再喝一杯酸梅汤。解解辣。
en: You'll meet even more. Here, have another glass of sour plum drink. Cools down the spice.

zh: 今天的火锅真好吃。谢谢你请我吃火锅。
en: Today's hotpot was really good. Thanks for treating me.

zh: 不用谢。我也吃得很开心。
en: Don't mention it. I really enjoyed it too.

zh: （沉默了一会儿，轻声说）其实……今天是我生日。
en: （After a moment of silence, says softly）Actually... today's my birthday.

zh: 我知道。
en: I know.

zh: 你……你怎么知道？
en: You... how did you know?

zh: 拍宣传册那天，看到你身份证了。
en: The day we shot the brochure. I saw your ID.

zh: ……你记性真好。
en: ...You have a really good memory.

zh: 关于你的事，我都记得。给，生日礼物。
en: I remember everything about you. Here, your birthday present.

zh: 你……你还给我准备了礼物？
en: You... you even got me a gift?

zh: 打开看看吧。
en: Go on, open it.

zh: （看着照片，眼睛一下子红了）这是……那天晚上的萤火虫……
en: （Looking at the photo, eyes suddenly reddening）These are... the fireflies from that night...

zh: 嗯。我觉得这张照片拍得最好，所以打印出来送给你。
en: Mm-hmm. I thought this was the best shot I took, so I had it printed for you.

zh: 希望你每次看到它，都能想起那个美好的夜晚。
en: I hope every time you look at it, you'll remember that beautiful night.

zh: （眼泪一下子掉了下来）谢谢你……林辰。
en: （Tears streaming down）Thank you... Lin Chen.

zh: 这是我收到过最好的生日礼物。
en: This is the best birthday gift I've ever received.

zh: 以前从来没有人记得我的生日，也没有人给我送过礼物。
en: No one's ever remembered my birthday before. No one's ever given me a gift.

zh: 以后每年的生日，我都陪你过。
en: From now on, I'll be here for your birthday every single year.

zh: （红着眼眶，吸了吸鼻子）哼……还行吧，勉强及格。
en: （Eyes still red, sniffling）Hmph... it's okay, I guess. Barely passes.

zh: （小声）其实……挺好看的。
en: （Muttering）Actually... it's pretty nice.

zh: 喜欢就好。
en: Glad you like it.

zh: （靠在栏杆上，看着对岸的灯光）林辰，你知道我为什么要做Lolita品牌吗？
en: （Leaning on the railing, looking at the lights across the river）Lin Chen, do you know why I started a Lolita brand?

zh: 嗯？为什么？
en: Huh? Why?

zh: 小时候在英国，我喜欢穿Lolita裙，同学们都嘲笑我，说我穿得像个怪物。
en: When I was little in England, I loved wearing Lolita dresses. The other kids made fun of me, said I looked like a monster.

zh: 后来回到中国，又有人说我崇洋媚外，说我穿奇装异服。
en: Then when I came back to China, people said I was a foreign-worshipper, said I wore weird costumes.

zh: 那时候我就想，Lolita是我的盔甲。穿上它，我就可以变得很强大，就不会再被别人欺负了。
en: Back then I thought—Lolita is my armor. When I wear it, I can be strong. No one can hurt me anymore.

zh: 不是盔甲。
en: It's not armor.

zh: 嗯？
en: Huh?

zh: 是翅膀。穿上它的你，是最自由的。
en: It's wings. When you wear it, you're free.

zh: （转过头看着我，眼睛里闪烁着泪光）翅膀……
en: （Turns to look at me, tears glistening in her eyes）Wings...

zh: 林辰……谢谢你出现在我的生命里。
en: Lin Chen... thank you for coming into my life.

zh: 如果没有你，我可能早就放弃了。
en: If it weren't for you, I might have given up a long time ago.

zh: 其实我也想说一样的话。遇到你之后，我的生活也变得不一样了。
en: Actually, I feel the same way. After I met you, my life changed too.

zh: （低下头，小声说）笨蛋。
en: （Lowers her head, mutters）Idiot.

zh: 我们是搭档嘛。你的事，就是我的事。
en: We're partners, aren't we? Your business is my business.

zh: ……哦，对。搭档。
en: ...Oh, right. Partners.

zh: 我到了。
en: I'm here.

zh: 嗯。上去吧，早点休息。
en: Mm-hmm. Go on up, get some rest.

zh: 今天……是我过得最开心的一个生日。
en: Today... was the happiest birthday I've ever had.

zh: 明年生日，你也来。
en: Next year, you're coming too.

zh: 你来了啊！快过来帮我看看这个吊牌有没有问题。
en: You're here! Come quick, check this hangtag—does it look okay?

zh: 没问题，设计得很好看。
en: It's fine. The design looks great.

zh: 那就好。所有的准备工作都差不多了，就等明天的样衣送到了。
en: Good. All the prep work is pretty much done, just waiting for the sample dress to arrive tomorrow.

zh: 这次的发布会我准备了很久，一定要成功。
en: I've been preparing for this runway show for so long. It has to succeed.

zh: 一定会成功的。你的设计这么好，大家都会喜欢的。
en: It will succeed. Your designs are amazing—everyone's going to love them.

zh: 哼，那是当然。也不看看是谁设计的。
en: Hmph, obviously. I mean, look who designed them.

zh: 喂？您好，是快递吗？
en: Hello? Hi, is this the courier?

zh: 对，是我的快递。麻烦您送上来吧，谢谢。
en: Yes, that's my package. Could you bring it up? Thanks.

zh: 太好了！样衣到了！
en: Yes! The sample's here!

zh: 来了来了！
en: Coming, coming!

zh: 您好，安小姐的快递。麻烦签收一下。
en: Hello, delivery for Miss An. Please sign here.

zh: 谢谢！
en: Thanks!

zh: 空的？箱子是空的！
en: Empty? The box is empty!

zh: 怎么会这样？
en: How... how is this possible?

zh: 不可能！我明明看着快递员把样衣装进去的！
en: No way! I literally saw the courier pack the dress inside!

zh: 样衣呢？我的样衣去哪里了？
en: Where's the sample? Where did my sample go?

zh: 喂！我的快递怎么是空的？！你把我的样衣弄到哪里去了？
en: Hey! How is my package empty?! Where did you take my sample dress?

zh: 什么？中转站搞错了？送到别的地方去了？
en: What? The sorting center made a mistake? It got sent somewhere else?

zh: 那什么时候能找回来？明天早上？不行！明天早上我就要用！
en: When can you find it? Tomorrow morning? No! I need it tomorrow morning!

zh: 完了……一切都完了。
en: It's over... everything's ruined.

zh: 明天就是发布会了，没有样衣，我怎么开发布会？
en: The runway show is tomorrow. Without the sample, how am I supposed to do the show?

zh: 所有人都在等着看我的笑话……我就知道，我根本就做不好……
en: Everyone's just waiting to watch me fail... I knew it, I can't do anything right...

zh: 我真的好没用……
en: I'm so useless...

zh: 安雅，别这样。
en: Anya, don't do this.

zh: 现在哭解决不了问题。我们还有时间。
en: Crying won't solve anything right now. We still have time.

zh: 先去快递中转站，一定能在今天晚上把样衣找回来。
en: Let's go to the courier's sorting center first. We'll definitely find the sample tonight.

zh: 备用布料不是还有吗？一晚上做不完，我们就做一晚上。
en: Don't we still have backup fabric? If we can't finish it in one night, we'll work through the night.

zh: 我陪你通宵。钉珠子、剪线头，我都能干。
en: I'll pull an all-nighter with you. Sewing beads, trimming threads—I can do it all.

zh: 相信我。我们现在就去快递中转站，一定能在今天晚上把样衣找回来。
en: Trust me. Let's go to the sorting center right now. We'll definitely get the sample back tonight.
